productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men CFC A JSY Black T-shirts
description: Composition Black Chelsea V-neck jersey made of 100% polyester, with ClimaCool technology, Chelsea football Club badge appliquéd on the chest, brand logo on the chest and sleeves and patented adidas 3-Stripes running down the short Sleeve sleeves Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in lukewarm water below 40 degrees, using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron Do not dry clean Do not iron directly on print/trims/ logo Chelsea's ascent to the top of the English Premier League has been nothing Short Sleeve of incredible. Follow the club on the road with this adidas Chelsea Football Club Away Jersey. Its fresh fade print pops off the black fabric to create a bold new statement that's sure to catch a million eyes. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.1'', Chest- 38.5”
